vehicle.model_designation_position: lower right of the grille (from viewer's perspective)

composition.truck_orientation: facing directly toward the camera, symmetrical
composition.important_crop_information: bottom of bumper and most of mirrors included, full roof visible, minimal cropping at sides

company_identity.appearance: dark blue text on white background with red company symbol

company_identity.position: middle of grille, above brand badge, diagonal (script)

owner_signatures.position: left of 'H.Z. Logistics' on sign panel
lower grille, right of center (from viewer's perspective)

roof_lights.position: roof, slightly above windshield, evenly spaced

bumper_lights.position: outer edges of bottom bumper, left and right

main_headlights.position: mid-lower section of cab, integrated in main front panels left and right

windshield_contents.description: Green sticker with white digit '6' in circle

front_geometry.grille_description: Black and chrome horizontal bars, angled trapezoidal layout, dominant central brand badge
front_geometry.headlight_description: Rectangular, multi-section, integrated in lower front sides
front_geometry.bumper_description: Blue with integrated lights, white and chrome central accent, license plate centered
